sources.title: The Three Mesquiteers (1936) WESTERN
sources.description:
Stars: Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Syd Saylor
 Director: Ray Taylor

 When a group of war buddies head west to farmstead, they run into trouble!

sources.title: The Three Mesquiteers (1937) Western film Directed by Joseph Kane
sources.description:
A crooked real estate manipulator sells worthless land on mortgage to flood refugees, then tries to profit by reselling the land to the state, committing murder in the process, as the Three Mesquiteers work to bring him and his gang to justice.

Original title: Gunsmoke Ranch (1937) | AKA: The Three Mesquiteers 
b&w version https://youtu.be/PIIszf_c5dM

⭐️ STARRING
Robert Livingston - Stony Brooke
Ray "Crash" Corrigan - Tucson Smith
Max Terhune - Lullaby Joslin
Kenneth Harlan - Phineas T. Flagg
Jean Carmen - Marion Warren
Sammy McKim - Jimmy Warren
Ed 'Oscar' Platt - Oscar 
Lou Fulton - Elmer Twiddlebaum
Burr Caruth - Judge Jonathan Warren
Allen Connor - Henchman Reggie Allen
Yakima Canutt - Henchman Spider
Horace B. Carpenter - Joe Larkin
Jane Keckley - Mathilda Larkin
Robert D. Walker - Seth Williams (as Robert Walker)
Jack Ingram - Cowhand Jed
Jack Kirk - Sheriff
Loren Riebe as Henchman Hank
Vinegar Roan - Henchman Zeke
Jack Padjan - Henchman Charles 'Duke' Madden

🎬 CREW
Directed by Joseph Kane 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2gsu7VGzgdYDDUshEcMs1CHZW1booguo
Story by Oliver Drake & Jack Natteford

🎯 WHY WATCH?
🤠 Classic Cowboy Camaraderie • 🤹‍♂️ Dummy-Wielding Comedy • 🌊 Floodgate Tension
Max Terhune’s ventriloquist act steals scenes like a bandit robbing a stagecoach!
Yakima Canutt’s gravity-defying stunts – watch him ride, leap, and brawl!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

Western • Adventure • Comedy • Classic Film • 1930s

sources.title: 1937 Western - The Three Mesquiteers: Come On, Cowboys - Circus chaos, cowboy justice.
sources.description:
One for all and all for the nearest fight...or frolic!
When a counterfeiting ring hides behind a circus and pins the scheme on its innocent co-owner Jeff Harris, the Three Mesquiteers ride to his defense and take charge of his young daughter. They juggle a judge’s ultimatum, a sham-wedding twist, and a mid-ring trap to flush out the mastermind and keep both the show—and the child—safe.

Colorized version: https://youtu.be/FVchElBEGU0

Director: Joseph Kane
Writers: Betty Burbridge, William Colt MacDonald
Stars: Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune
Genres: Drama, Western

metadata.Plot: Lullaby and his World War I buddies head west to farmstead. When the Canfield brothers try to stop them, they get help from Stony and Tucson as Livingstone and Corrigan start their long run as Mesquiteers while Saylor makes his lone appearance.
metadata.Writer: Jack Natteford, Charles R. Condon, William Colt MacDonald
metadata.Actors: Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Syd Saylor
